sharc
Documentation développeur
Logger.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Text;
3 using System.IO;
4 using System.Reflection;
5 using System.Resources;
6 
7 namespace ApplicationLauncher
8 {
9  public class Logger
10  {
11  static public void configureOutputFile(String output_file)
12  {
13  if (output_file != null)
14  {
15  bool overwritten = File.Exists(output_file);
16  StreamWriter sw = new StreamWriter(output_file);
17  sw.AutoFlush = true;
18  Console.SetOut (new MirroringTextWriter(Console.Out, sw));
19 
20  if (overwritten) log(Channel.Warning, "output file '{0}' will be overwritten",output_file);
21  }
22  }
23 
24  static public void configureEnableDebug(bool flag) {
25  enable_debug_mode = flag;
26  }
27 
28  #region Logging facilities
29  public enum Channel { Execute=0, ExecuteError, Debug, DevDebug, Verbose, Error, Warning, Dry, Info, MPIInfo, Banner };
30  private static readonly string[] StringChannel = { "Execute", "Execute Error", "Debug", "Development", "Verbose", "Error", "Warning", "Dry", "Info", "MPI info", "" };
31 
32  static public void log(Channel c, string format)
33  {
34  log(c, format, new object[]{});
35  }
36 
37  static public void log(Channel c, string format, object arg0)
38  {
39  log(c, format, new object[]{arg0});
40  }
41 
42  static public void log(Channel c, string format, object arg0, object arg1)
43  {
44  log(c, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1});
45  }
46 
47  static public void log(Channel c, string format, object arg0, object arg1, object arg2)
48  {
49  log(c, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1, arg2});
50  }
51 
52  static public void log(Channel c, string format, object arg0, object arg1, object arg2, object arg3)
53  {
54  log(c, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1, arg2, arg3});
55  }
56 
57  static public void log(Channel c, string format, Object[] args)
58  {
59  if (c == Channel.Debug && !enable_debug_mode)
60  return;
61 #if !DEBUG
62  if (c == Channel.DevDebug)
63  return;
64 #endif
65 
66  String channel = StringChannel [(int)c];
67  StringBuilder message = new StringBuilder();
68  if (c != Channel.Banner)
69  message.AppendFormat ("[{0}] ", channel);
70  message.AppendFormat (format, args);
71  if (c == Channel.Warning || c == Channel.Error)
72  Console.ForegroundColor = ConsoleColor.Red;
73  String s = message.ToString ();
74  if (c == Channel.Banner)
75  s = getBanner (s);
76  Console.WriteLine( s );
77  Console.ResetColor ();
78  }
79 
80  static public void log(string channel, string format)
81  {
82  log(channel, format, new object[]{});
83  }
84 
85  static public void log(string channel, string format, object arg0)
86  {
87  log(channel, format, new object[]{arg0});
88  }
89 
90  static public void log(string channel, string format, object arg0, object arg1)
91  {
92  log(channel, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1});
93  }
94 
95  static public void log(string channel, string format, object arg0, object arg1, object arg2)
96  {
97  log(channel, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1, arg2});
98  }
99 
100  static public void log(string channel, string format, object arg0, object arg1, object arg2, object arg3)
101  {
102  log(channel, format, new object[]{arg0, arg1, arg2, arg3});
103  }
104 
105  static public void log(string channel, string format, Object[] args)
106  {
107  StringBuilder message = new StringBuilder();
108  message.AppendFormat ("[{0}] ", channel);
109  message.AppendFormat (format, args);
110  String s = message.ToString ();
111  Console.WriteLine( s );
112  }
113 
114  private class MirroringTextWriter : TextWriter {
115  private TextWriter main, aux;
116 
117  public MirroringTextWriter(TextWriter Main, TextWriter Aux) {
118  main = Main;
119  aux = Aux;
120  }
121  public override Encoding Encoding {
122  get {
123  return main.Encoding;
124  }
125  }
126  public override void Write(char value) {
127  main.Write (value);
128  aux.Write (value);
129  }
130  public override void Write(string value) {
131  main.Write (value);
132  aux.Write (value);
133  }
134  };
135  #endregion
136 
137  #region BANNERS
138  static private string getBanner(string title)
139  {
140  Assembly assembly = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly ();
141  ResourceReader reader = new ResourceReader(assembly.GetManifestResourceStream ("ApplicationLauncher.Resources.Banners.resources"));
142  ResourceSet resSet = new ResourceSet (reader);
143 
144  // Build banner char by char
145  string[] lines = new string[13];
146  foreach(char c in title)
147  {
148  string char_name = null;
149  if (c >= 'A' && c <= 'Z') { char_name = "big-char-" + c; }
150  else if (c >= 'a' && c <= 'z') { char_name = "small-char-" + c; }
151  else if (c >= '0' && c <= '9') { char_name = "num-char-" + c; }
152  else { char_name = "char-" + c; }
153  String banner = resSet.GetString(char_name);
154  if (banner != null) {
155  string[] char_lines = banner.Split('\n');
156  for(int i=0;i<char_lines.Length;++i)
157  lines[i] += char_lines[i];
158  } else if (Launcher.Options.internal_debug == Launcher.InternalDebugMode.Info) {
159  Logger.log(Channel.Error, "Unknown char '{0}'",c);
160  }
161  }
162 
163  // Underline chars
164  char[] line = lines [10].ToCharArray ();
165  bool prev_white = true;
166  for(int j=0;j<line.Length;++j) {
167  bool current_white = (line[j] == ' ');
168  bool next_white = (j < line.Length-1)?(line[j+1] == ' '):true;
169  if (prev_white && current_white && next_white) {
170  line[j] = 'o';
171  }
172  prev_white = current_white;
173  }
174  lines[10]= new string(line);
175 
176  string full_banner = "";
177  for (int i=0; i<lines.Length-1; ++i)
178  full_banner += lines [i] + '\n';
179  return full_banner;
180  }
181  #endregion
182 
183  #region MEMBERS
184  private static bool enable_debug_mode = false;
185  #endregion
186  }
187 }
188
